texto: Suppose each of us make up a list of, say, fifty or more books that we believe should be in the library. Then , when Robinson goes to the bookseller in Philadelphia let him start with the first of each of our chooses, then the second of each, and so on down, omitting duplicates, of course. Let him go as far as his money lasts. How does that sound.""Vandaliz has a library," Fell said, "and so has Springfield and Edwardsville. why not Everton.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Harold Sinclair sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Suppose each of us make up a list of, say, fifty or more books that we believe should be in the l…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, libraries, library, útil em momentos de reflexao.
